---
ID: US-OLV-116
Title: Standardize pill styling
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-20
Milestone: Introduce shared OliverDock and upload flows

As a operator
I want one consistent pill style across modules
So that status chips remain legible and consistent

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Accounts, HR, and SDR pill CSS uses the shared tokenized size/padding rules.
- [ ] The old pill--xs modifier is removed.
- [ ] People cards use unified pill styling.
- [ ] Pill text does not overflow common card layouts.

Notes: Pill sizing was adjusted across Apr 20 and Apr 22 commits.
